title: Yogb@hah #3011
definition:
Jogbehah = "lofty"

 1) one of the cities east of the Jordan which was built and fortified
    by the tribe of Gad
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jogbehah = "lofty"

 1) one of the cities east of the Jordan which was built and fortified
    by the tribe of Gad

    NASB:  perh. exalted, a place in Gad
